Variable.Name: BannerConfigJson
Variable.Value: {"title":"{ToastTitle}","message":"{ToastBody} {ToastRunForm}","status":"{ToastStatus}","formName":"{NewFormName}"}

Variable.Name: cds_CashBalGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object21( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(DomBalance) XAXISLABEL(BankCode) LEGENDS(sBalance) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) LOADJIT())

Variable.Name: cds_CUSTRENDERdiagram1
Variable.Value: V(cds_SHAPELIBdiagram1) DIAGRAMLAYOUTLAYER(50) DIAGRAMLAYOUTVERTEX(100)

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceAccountsLedgerGrid
Variable.Value: object3.SLLedgerAlls( CA(IVR) READMODE(COMMITTED) FILTERPERM(TransDate BETWEEN FV(PeriodStartDate) AND dbo.DayEndOf(FV(PeriodEndDate)) AND FromId IN (SELECT id FROM jour_hdr WITH (READUNCOMMITTED) WHERE (jour_hdr.type = 'U' OR jour_hdr.id = 'General'))) ORDERBY(SiteRef,TransNum) LINKBY(LedgerAcct=Acct,SiteRef=SiteRef) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceJobVarMatlGrid
Variable.Value: object14.SLControllerAlls2.Home_JobVarianceMatlSp( V(cdsmp1_JobVarMatlGrid) CA(IGVR) LINKBY(JobJob=JobJob,JobSuffix=JobSuffix,JobItem=JobItem,JobQtyReleased=JobQtyReleased,SiteRef=SiteRef) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourceJobVarOperGrid
Variable.Value: object14.SLControllerAlls.Home_JobVarianceOperSp( V(cdsmp1_JobVarOperGrid) CA(IGVR) LINKBY(JobJob=JobJob,JobSuffix=JobSuffix,JobItem=JobItem,JobQtyReleased=JobQtyReleased,SiteRef=SiteRef) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataSourcePurchaseCostPOGrid
Variable.Value: object13.SLControllerAlls.Home_POVarianceSp( V(cdsmp1_PurchaseCostPOGrid) CA(IGVR) ORDERBY(SiteRef, VendNum, PoNum, PoLine) LINKBY(SLControllerAlls=SiteRef,SLControllerAlls=VendNum,SLControllerAlls=PoNum,SLControllerAlls=PoLine) )

Variable.Name: cds_diagram1
Variable.Value: diagram(DIAGRAMTOOLBARVISIBLE(0) DIAGRAMTOOLBARLOCATION(Top) DIAGRAMNAVPANEVISIBLE(0) DIAGRAMVIEWBACKCOLOR(0,0,0) DIAGRAMVIEWLAYOUT(Fit) DIAGRAMADJUSTDOCSIZETOVIEW(0) DIAGRAMSHAPEIDVARNAME(DiagramSelectedShapeID) DIAGRAMSHAPENAMEVARNAME(DiagramSelectedShapeName) DIAGRAMSHAPEGUIDVARNAME(DiagramSelectedShapeUniqueID) DIAGRAMSHAPEDOUBLECLICKEVENT(DiagramShapeDoubleClicked) V(cds_PROTECT1Ddiagram1) V(cds_PROTECT2Ddiagram1) V(cds_CUSTRENDERdiagram1) DIAGRAMUSECUSTOMTERACTIVE(1) V(cds_DSDVIdiagram1) )

Variable.Name: cds_DSDVIdiagram1
Variable.Value: DIAGRAMVIEWINTERACTIVE(<?xml version="1.0"?>_x0D_ <NInteractiveAppearance xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" SelectedAppearanceChangeMode="FillStyle">_x0D_ <SelectedFillStyle xsi:type="NColorFillStyle" Color="0,4289781990" />_x0D_ <SelectedStrokeStyle Color="0,4294901760">_x0D_ <Width Value="1" MeasurementUnit="GDI,Point" />_x0D_ </SelectedStrokeStyle>_x0D_ <HighlightedFillStyle xsi:type="NColorFillStyle" Color="0,4294967265" />_x0D_ <Highlighted
Variable.Value2: StrokeStyle Color="0,4290690750">_x0D_ <Width Value="2" MeasurementUnit="GDI,Point" />_x0D_ </HighlightedStrokeStyle>_x0D_ <SelectedTextFillStyle xsi:type="NColorFillStyle" Color="0,4278190080" />_x0D_ <HighlightedTextFillStyle xsi:type="NColorFillStyle" Color="0,4278190208" />_x0D_ </NInteractiveAppearance>)

Variable.Name: cds_MetricCashImpactGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object20( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(GraphAmount) XAXISLABEL(GraphDate) LEGENDS(sRunningNetChange) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSLine) LOADJIT())

Variable.Name: cds_MetricDPOGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object16( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(DPOAmount1) XAXISLABEL(KPIDate) LEGENDS(sAmount) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSBar2D) LOADJIT())

Variable.Name: cds_MetricDSOGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(DSOAmount1) XAXISLABEL(KPIDate) LEGENDS(sAmount) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSBar2D) LOADJIT())

Variable.Name: cds_PROTECT1Ddiagram1
Variable.Value: TrackersEdit,ContextMenuEdit,MoveX,MoveY,ResizeX,ResizeY,ChangeAspectRatio,Rotate,Delete,Group,Ungroup,Compose,Decompose,ChangeStartPoint,ChangeEndPoint,ReorderElements,InsertElements,RemoveElements,Copy,

Variable.Name: cds_PROTECT2Ddiagram1
Variable.Value: TrackersEdit,ContextMenuEdit,MoveX,MoveY,ResizeX,ResizeY,ChangeAspectRatio,Rotate,Delete,Group,Ungroup,Compose,Decompose,ChangeStartPoint,ChangeEndPoint,ReorderElements,InsertElements,RemoveElements,Copy,

Variable.Name: cds_SHAPELIBdiagram1
Variable.Value: DIAGRAMSHAPELIBRARYVISIBLE(0) DIAGRAMSHAPEALLOWDROP(0)

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBAcctBalCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(HLinearGauge) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(3) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(All) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBBadDebtCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(AngularGauge) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(84) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(All) GAUGEKPIPARM1(V(BankCodeVar)) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBCredDayCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Thermometer) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(86) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(All) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBCusCredCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Bulb) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(83) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Long) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(None) GAUGEKPIPARM2(V(BankCodeVar)) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBDebtDayCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(Thermometer) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(85) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(All) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBInvTrnsCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(AngularGauge) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(28) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(Actual) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBInvValCritical
Variable.Value: gauge.kpi( GAUGETYPE(HLinearGauge) GAUGECANNEDCRITICALNUMBER(2) GAUGEDATERANGE(All) GAUGECAPTIONFRMT(Default) GAUGESUBCAPTIONFRMT(All) GAUGEKPIPARM2(V(ItemVar)) LOADJIT() )

Variable.Name: cds_SSSWBSuperGrid
Variable.Value: dataview( DATAVIEWMODE(PREDEFINED) DATAVIEWNAME(HIL Aftersales Open Orders) )

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_JobVarMatlGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(vHomeJobVarianceMatlFilterString), VAR C(JobVarJobJobGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobSuffixGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobItemGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobQtyReleasedGridCol), VAR V(SiteGroup), VAR C(JobVarJobPlantGridCol))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_JobVarOperGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(vHomeJobVarianceOperFilterString), VAR C(JobVarJobJobGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobSuffixGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobItemGridCol), VAR C(JobVarJobQtyReleasedGridCol), VAR V(SiteGroup), VAR C(JobVarJobPlantGridCol))

Variable.Name: cdsmp1_PurchaseCostPOGrid
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(vHomePOVarianceFilterString), VAR C(PurchaseCostItemItemGridCol), VAR V(SiteGroup), VAR C(PurchaseCostSiteGridCol))

Variable.Name: CurrentFormName
Variable.Value: ControllerHome

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetAccountsFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(AccountsFiscalYearEdit), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart1), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart2), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart3), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart4), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart5), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart6), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart7), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart8), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart9), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart10), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart11), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart12), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart13), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd1), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd2), RVAR V(Accoun
Variable.Value2: tsPeriodEnd3), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd4), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd5), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd6), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd7), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd8), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd9), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd10),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(AccountsFiscalYearEdit), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart1), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart2), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart3), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart4), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart5), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart6), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart7), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart8), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart9), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart10), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart11), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart12), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodStart13), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd1), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd2), RVAR V(Accoun
Variable.Value2: tsPeriodEnd3), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd4), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd5), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd6), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd7), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd8), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd9), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd10),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetJobVarFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(JobVarFiscalYearEdit), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart1), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart2), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart3), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart4), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart5), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart6), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart7), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart8), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart9), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart10), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart11), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart12), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodStart13), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd1), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd2), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd3), RVAR V(JobVarPeriod
Variable.Value2: End4), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd5), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd6), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd7), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd8), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd9), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd10), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd11), RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd12),)

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetAccountsFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd11), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd12), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd13), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd11), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd12), RVAR V(AccountsPeriodEnd13), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetJobVarFiscalPeriods0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR V(JobVarPeriodEnd13), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: ( NOTPRIMARY() DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC10
Variable.Value: OBJECT10( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol10MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC11
Variable.Value: OBJECT11( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol11MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC12
Variable.Value: OBJECT12( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol12MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC13
Variable.Value: OBJECT13( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol13MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC14
Variable.Value: OBJECT14( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol14MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC15
Variable.Value: OBJECT15( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC16
Variable.Value: OBJECT16( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Value: OBJECT17( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Value: OBJECT18( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Value: OBJECT19( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol2MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC20
Variable.Value: OBJECT20( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC21
Variable.Value: OBJECT21( SLBankHdrs( CA(R) OBJNAME(oBankReconciliationHeader) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol3MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC4
Variable.Value: OBJECT4( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol4MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC5
Variable.Value: OBJECT5( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol5MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Value: OBJECT6( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol6MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC7
Variable.Value: OBJECT7( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol7MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Value: OBJECT8( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol8MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC9
Variable.Value: OBJECT9( SLControllers.Home_MetricCashImpactSp( V(fds1_SecCol9MethodParms) CA(R) OBJNAME(oSLControllers) DEFERREFRESHUNTILVISIBLE() LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SecondaryCollections
Variable.Value: V(fds_SC2) V(fds_SC3) V(fds_SC4) V(fds_SC5) V(fds_SC6)

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR , VAR , VAR )

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol10MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Name: fds1_SecCol11MethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Value: PARMS()

Variable.Name: HelpFileVar
Variable.Value: FlowHelp9Edit

Variable.Name: lse_CashImpactCashTypeGridCol
Variable.Value: ARTransaction\sARTransaction,CustomerOrder\sCustomerOrder,ProgressiveBill\sProgressiveBill,COBlanketLine\sCOBlanketLine,EstimateOrder\sEstimateOrder,TotalCashIn\sTotalCashIn,APTransaction\sAPTransaction,PurchaseOrder\sPurchaseOrder,POBlanketLine\sPOBlanketLine,PORequisitions\sPORequisitions,TotalCashOut\sTotalCashOut,NetChange\sNetChange,RunningNetChange\sRunningNetChange

Variable.Name: lsm1_PurchaseCostItemItemGridCol
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(vFilterString), VAR V(SiteGroup))

Variable.Name: SiteFilter
Variable.Value: SiteRef IN (select site from site_group where site_group.site_group = FV(SiteGroup))

Variable.Name: SSSWBSuperGridMode
Variable.Value: View

Variable.Name: ToastTitle
Variable.Value: sEndOfSupport
